features: Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Proof Review page using the generated command-center blueprint
Added KPI row for pending review, approved, rejected, included in reports, total media, and expired proofs
Added tabs: All Proof, Pending Review, Approved, Rejected, Included in Reports
Added filters: guard, client, property, type, date range, sort
Added proof media list with photo/video thumbnails, property details, guard, patrol, upload time, status, and actions
Added selected proof detail rail with media preview, file metadata, guard/property/request details, notes, and review actions
Added approve proof, reject proof, include/remove from report, internal note save, row selection, pagination, rows per page, clear filters, and CSV export
Uses guard-uploaded proof only; no URL input added
Stores review status and inclusion locally when permanent review SQL fields are unavailable
Preserved Activity Log Command Center and previous pages
